title: TekTopia Classic Faithful 32x
description: A Classic Faithful resource pack for TangoTek's TekTopia mod.
body: This project has since been abandoned by its original owner for some time, so I am taking it over. If you believe that any updates need to be made, please let me know in the comments! As far as I can tell, TekTopia is still on version 1.1.0, and the available textures still match with that update. This requires the original [Faithful resource pack](https://faithfulpack.net/classicfaithful/32x-programmer-art) and TangoTek's [TekTopia mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tektopia)! Go download them if you haven't already! Credit for the idea and some of the models and textures go to Vattic. Credit for the concept goes to the original author who wishes to remain anonymous as of now (if you know, you know). Credit for the upscaled entity textures goes to me and TangoTek. Credit for the original assets goes to TangoTek.
